search:React + Next.js Authentication Be.content:
- Use `npx create-next-app@latest` to start a new Next.js project.
- Implement authentication using packages like `next-auth`.
- Configure `next.config.js` for environment variables and other settings.
- Utilize server components and actions for secure handling of authentication logic.
- Set up middleware for protected routes with `middleware.js`.
- Use JWT (JSON Web Tokens) for session management.
- Regularly update dependencies to the latest versions using `npm update`.
- Implement role-based access control (RBAC) for fine-grained permissions.
- Test authentication flows thoroughly in both development and production environments.
